sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56530" key="kelufokomi=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κελυφοκομῖον </orth>( <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">= -εῖον</orth>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n56530.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lepers' hospital, BMus.Cat.Coptic MSS.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:p.453" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.453</biblScope> </bibl> No.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:1077" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1077</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κελεφος</itype>.</sense> </entryFree>
